title: Mexican Peruvian Rice Pilaf
description: A hearty, flavorful rice pilaf dish with Peruvian flair, inspired by Mexican cuisine.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, garlic, and red bell pepper, and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the Peruvian rice and crisp rice, and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and ground cumin.
Fluff the rice pilaf with a fork and serve.
Optional: add cooked vegetables or beans for extra nutrition.
